particulars.description: 30-32 scotland road nelson by way of fixed charge, the benefit of all covenants & rights concerning the property & all plant machinery, fixtures, fittings, furniture, equipment, implements & utensils. The goodwill of any business carried on at the property & the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
